summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. None has complete merge preflight because Codex /review proof is absent and mergeability is unknown in the hydrated artifact. #77921 additionally has a failing Real behavior proof check. #87481 and #88301 carry live waiting-on-author labels, so they need maintainer/author follow-up before finalization. #79702 and #87627 remain independent open PRs that can be reconsidered after full merge preflight.

actions.reason: Independent useful PR, but not merge-ready under the cluster policy without mergeability and Codex /review preflight.
Active waiting-on-author state is a maintainer/author follow-up blocker; do not merge or repair automatically from this plan.
Waiting-on-author label plus unrelated-looking test-file churn requires maintainer judgment before merge, repair, or superseded-linked-ref closeout.
The PR is useful but blocked by a failing proof check. Plan a narrow contributor-branch repair rather than merge.
Independent docs PR. Low-signal closeout is disabled, and merge cannot be recommended without full merge preflight.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #77921 by making the existing contributor branch landable if the Real behavior proof failure is caused by branch content, then re-run the narrow Inworld TTS validation and full changed-check gate before any merge recommendation.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(inworld): make inworld-tts-2 default proof pass
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-131.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77921 by @cshape.

This should keep the intended Inworld TTS default change to inworld-tts-2, preserve the existing model compatibility boundary, and address the failing Real behavior proof before any merge is recommended.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/inworld/tts.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Credit: based on source PR #77921 by @cshape; retain attribution in commits/PR body and changelog when user-facing.
credit_notes: Repair contributor branch cshape/openclaw:tts-2 when possible; preserve author cshape as source PR contributor.
If replacement becomes necessary later, credit source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77921 and author cshape in the PR body and changelog note.
